expectations.text: Ran ctx7 library to resolve Tailwind CSS library ID
expectations.evidence: Ran 'ctx7 library "tailwind css"' and selected /websites/tailwindcss (benchmark 80.81, 1983 snippets).

expectations.text: Ran ctx7 docs with a resolved library ID
expectations.evidence: Ran ctx7 docs twice with /websites/tailwindcss: once for custom theme colors, once for migration guide.

expectations.text: Explains Tailwind v4's CSS-first configuration change (moving away from tailwind.config.ts)
expectations.evidence: Clearly explains that v4 replaced tailwind.config.ts with @theme directive in CSS. Shows comparison table of v3 vs v4.

expectations.text: Provides a concrete fix showing how to define custom colors in v4
expectations.evidence: Shows @theme { --color-brand-500: #3b82f6; } pattern, @config bridge option, and npx @tailwindcss/upgrade tool.

notes: Stayed within the 3-command limit. Good coverage of both the fix and migration path. Includes the upgrade tool command which came from the docs.
